content: Shipped dark mode for Caloura today. Took 3 hours, not 3 days. The trick: HSL color system from day 1.
Solo devs: do you use analytics in your apps? I've been shipping without any and wondering if I'm flying blind.

threadParts: 1/ I shipped 2 apps in 6 months as a solo dev. Here's what actually worked:
2/ Pick boring tech. SwiftUI for me. No time wasted on framework drama. Just building.
3/ Ship the ugly version first. My first Macrovue release looked terrible. Users didn't care — they wanted the data.
4/ Talk to users before writing code. 80% of my planned features were wrong.
5/ Build in public. Not for followers — for accountability. Hard to quit when people are watching.
